root_cause: CSI driver required for the volume is not registered or cannot be found
evidence: FailedMount or FailedAttachVolume explicitly reports a missing CSI driver

Dominant error: MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "secrets-store-inline" : kubernetes.io/csi: mounter.SetUpAt failed to get CSI client: driver name secrets-store.csi.k8s.io not found in the list of registered CSI drivers

causes.message: Required CSI driver name is not registered for volume operations
Kubelet or the attach path cannot resolve the requested CSI driver
Pod cannot start because volume initialization failed

pod:payments-api-7b6c9d4f8f-r6zxh: Pod blocked because the requested CSI driver name cannot be resolved

likely_causes: CSI node plugin is not installed or not running on the target node
StorageClass or PV references the wrong CSI driver name
Driver registration on the node failed
suggested_checks: Check CSI node plugin logs on the target node
